home.title: Japanese practice hub
home.subtitle: Fast training sessions for kana, vocabulary and grammar – built for daily JLPT-style practice.
home.kanaDesc: Practice Hiragana and Katakana with quick quizzes and flexible set sizes.
home.vocabDesc: Short flashcard sessions with spaced repetition to practice JLPT-style Japanese words.
home.vocabOpen: Open N5 to N1 practice flashcards
home.grammarDesc: Fast grammar drills focused on structure, meaning and usage with instant feedback.
kanaTrainer.description: Choose Katakana or Hiragana, then pick the set size.
bottom.openModuleHint: Open a module to track live progress.
quiz.stoppedDesc: Resume from the bottom bar using a saved set, or start a new one.
quiz.stopSeriesDesc: You can save to resume later, or quit without saving.
quiz.savedDetectedDesc: Do you want to resume it or start a new set and replace it?
common.stopSetDesc: You can save to resume later, or quit without saving.
common.savedExistsDesc: Starting a new set will replace the current saved session. What do you want to do?
common.error.loadData: Some data failed to load. Please retry in a few seconds.
vocab.header.title: JLPT vocabulary exercise
vocab.header.subtitle: Choose your target level and launch a set.
vocab.poolMode.help: Cumulative includes all previous levels. Specific level targets one level only.
vocab.session.recallHint: Try to recall the meaning before revealing it.
vocab.done.desc: Great work. You can restart a set or change options.
vocab.done.nextStage: Validate and move to next stage
vocab.help.title: How flashcards work
vocab.help.priority: A set mixes cards by priority: due cards first, then weak cards, then new cards.
vocab.help.careerMode: you progress stage by stage on each level.
vocab.help.freeMode: you choose one level or a cumulative pool.
grammar.header.title: JLPT Grammar Trainer
grammar.header.subtitle: Train in a fast loop: structure, meaning, usage, instant feedback.
grammar.emptyData: No data for this level. Add grammar_n5 to grammar_n1 files via the pipeline.
grammar.question.label: Question
grammar.expected.meaning: Expected answer: choose the right meaning.
grammar.expected.structure: Expected answer: choose the right structure.
grammar.expected.usage: Expected answer: identify the structure used.
grammar.help.title: How Grammar Trainer works
grammar.help.overview: Each set mixes grammar points from the selected level. You answer quickly, then the next card appears automatically.
grammar.help.typeStructure: Structure = choose the right grammar form.
grammar.help.typeUsage: Usage = identify the structure in an example.
grammar.stop.desc: You can save to resume later, or quit without keeping current progress.
